title: ctenopteris merrittii
intro: Ctenopteris merrittii, also known as the Fivefinger Fern or New Zealand Fivefinger Fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris merrittii are said to include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
